creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Another "me too" from www/jericho-html

http://ampere2.nyi.freebsd.org/data/main-arm64-default/p65d71ce9bdd9_s592e876a42/logs/jericho-html-3.2.log

I can see that while upstream JDK has identified the problem, Java 8 has not yet been patched there (only in the newer JDKs).

Would that be possible to add a backported patch to our JDK 8 port?
